note: Cross-repo canonical pricing snapshot (auditoria 2026-07 F2-05/F7-01). App lib/maxwell/pricing.ts and Web lib/maxwell/proposal-rules.ts must both match this file — enforced by a pricing-parity test in EACH repo. To change pricing: update this file in BOTH repos (byte-identical) plus each repo's local table, in the same cross-repo change. A green parity test with a stale twin is the failure mode this file exists to make visible: diff the twins when in doubt — `revision` is there so a stale twin is obvious at a glance.
changelog: 2026-07-23-hosting-included: every `monthly` +$35. The membership INCLUDES hosting + database (owner model), so its price now carries the hosting cost explicitly. Before this, the cheapest memberships ($25/$32) sat BELOW the standalone hosting price ($35/mo), which made the hosting-only plan cost more than a plan that strictly contained it. `activation` values are unchanged. Existing Stripe subscriptions keep their own price — this only affects NEW proposals.
